briefdescription.para: Creates an uninitialized ScrollBar handle.
Copy constructor.
Move constructor.
Destructor.
Copy assignment operator.
Move assignment operator.
Gets the target view for which the scroll bar is responsible.
Gets the visibility of the vertical scroll bar.
Sets the visibility of the vertical scroll bar.
Gets the visibility of the horizontal scroll bar.
Sets the visibility of the horizontal scroll bar.

memberdef.argsstring: (float scrollWidth, float scrollHeight, float viewportWidth, float viewportHeight) override
memberdef.name: UpdateBarSize

briefdescription.para: Updates the size of the scroll bar based on the given scroll area and viewport size.

parameterdescription.para: The width of the scrollable area.
The height of the scrollable area.
The width of the visible area.
The height of the visible area.

briefdescription.para: Updates the scroll position of the scroll bar based on the given position.
Hides the scroll bar (fade out).

detaileddescription.para: Called when scrolling ends. Only affects bars with Auto visibility.

briefdescription.para: Gets or sets the thickness of the scroll bar.

simplesect.para: The thickness of the scroll bar.

briefdescription.para: Gets or sets the color of the scroll bar.

simplesect.para: The color of the scroll bar.

briefdescription.para: Gets or sets the minimum size of the scroll bar.

simplesect.para: The minimum size of the scroll bar.

briefdescription.para: Gets or sets the current scroll position of the target view.

Gets or sets the offset of bars from the edges. This creates a small gap between the bar and the scroll bar container edges. Padding can be set using View::SetPadding() which is inherited by ScrollBar.
Gets the corner radius of the scroll bar.

simplesect.para: The corner radius for each corner (topLeft, topRight, bottomRight, bottomLeft).

briefdescription.para: Sets the corner radius of the scroll bar (same for all corners).

parameterdescription.para: The corner radius to apply to all corners.

briefdescription.para: Sets the corner radius of the scroll bar for each corner individually.

parameterdescription.para: The corner radius (topLeft, topRight, bottomRight, bottomLeft).

briefdescription.para: Creates an initialized ScrollBar.

simplesect.para: A handle to a newly allocated Dali resource.

briefdescription.para: Downcasts a handle to ScrollBar handle.

simplesect.para: A handle to a ScrollBar or an uninitialized handle.

briefdescription.para: A class representing a scroll bar that can be used to control the scrolling of a view.
